intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制深化与AI工具重塑欧洲IP格局
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Matures, AI Reshapes European IP Landscape
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现司法统一化与技术智能化双轨并进态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过PMAC调解机制上线及年报发布，巩固其作为核心争议解决平台的地位，诉讼策略向ADR倾斜。EPO加速推进2027年无纸化及AI审查辅助，同时瑞士引入实质审查改变周边格局。商标与版权领域，欧盟法院强化声誉保护与数字内容报酬平衡。整体而言，欧洲正构建更高效、透明且技术驱动的IP保护网，合规与维权成本结构发生显著变化。
top_signals: UPC启动PMAC调解与仲裁服务，替代性争议解决机制正式融入统一专利体系
EPO确立2027年全面无纸化目标，拟强制要求指明修改依据并引用UPC判例
DeepIP收购PatentMaker，AI撰写工具在德国头部机构渗透率提升引发市场整合
瑞士专利法改革引入实质审查及英文申请通道，中欧专利布局策略需重新评估
cross_currents: 司法效率与程序正义的再平衡：UPC在追求快速判决的同时，通过PMAC提供低成本和解路径，反映法院案件管理从单纯审判向多元纠纷解决转型的趋势。
行政审查的算法化与人本底线：EPO虽大力整合AI工具支持预检索和起草，但明确坚持‘以人为本’的最终决策责任，表明AI在IP行政程序中仍处于辅助而非替代地位。
知识产权资产化的金融闭环：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP融资，结合UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽，显示欧洲政策重心从单纯的权利保护转向IP的商业变现与资本化支持。
implications: 中国企业需调整对欧诉讼策略，充分利用UPC新上线的PMAC调解机制降低维权成本，避免陷入高耗时的全面诉讼。
针对瑞士市场，应重新评估专利申请预算与时间表，利用其新增的英文申请通道及实质审查选项优化高质量专利布局。
关注EPO指南修订中关于‘指明修改依据’的潜在强制义务，提前规范内部答复流程，避免因形式瑕疵导致审查延误或权利丧失。
watchlist: EPO 2027年指南修订中关于异议程序及进入欧洲阶段的具体强制性要求落地情况
UPC上诉法院判例被纳入EPO审查指南后的具体引用方式及对创造性判断标准的实际影响
成员国如何将CJEU关于新闻出版者在线使用公平报酬的判决转化为国内立法，以及由此产生的合规成本

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC米兰地院强化举证责任与侵权认定
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Milan Clarifies Evidence Rules as EUIPO Design Reform Nears
daily_report.executive_line: UPC米兰分院确立专利文献公知常识例外及举证责任转移规则，结合轮胎案缺席判决，显示法院加速审理并强化权利人保护倾向。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于UPC司法实践深化与机构服务升级。UPC米兰分院在两起轮胎案中作出侵权认定，并明确专利文献作为公知常识的严格标准及信息不对称下的举证责任转移，显著提升诉讼可预测性。EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，为7月生效新规铺路。UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽，强化研究部门IP商业化支持。DeepIP收购德国PatentMaker，AI专利工具市场竞争加剧。

report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...
core_points_zh: 塞浦路斯知识产权盒提供80%利润扣除，结合15%企业税率，使合格IP收入有效税率降至约…
制度核心为修正关联法，确保税收减免比例与企业实际发生的合格研发支出相匹配，符合经合组织…
受版权保护的软件、算法及平台属于合格知识产权，但商标和徽标等品牌相关资产不符合该制度资格
core_points_en: Qualifying IP income benefits from an eighty percent deduction, yielding an effective tax rate near three percent.
The modified nexus approach links tax relief directly to substantiated research and development expenditures incurred by the entity.
Copyrighted software and digital assets qualify for the regime, whereas brand-related assets such as trademarks are excluded.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This regime is relevant for technology companies structuring IP ownership within the EU. It emphasizes substance over form, requiring robust documentation of R&D spend to justify tax benefits. Rights holders should assess whether their software development activities meet the modified nexus criteria to optimize fiscal efficiency while maintaining OECD compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Tech firms holding copyrighted software can significantly reduce tax liability on IP-derived income through structured R&D investment.
Practice note: Accurate allocation and documentation of qualifying R&D expenditures are essential to satisfy the modified nexus approach requirements.
What to monitor: Watch for evolving administrative guidance on eligible R&D costs and potential updates to OECD nexus standards affecting eligibility.

report_items.summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel mus...

daily_report.executive_line_en: The UPC Milan Local Division tightens evidentiary standards for common general knowledge, while EUIPO issues final guidance on design reforms effective July 2026.
daily_report.summary_en: This week’s European IP developments highlight significant procedural clarifications at the Unified Patent Court and regulatory updates from EUIPO. The UPC Milan Local Division issued key rulings in patent infringement cases involving tire manufacturers, establishing that patent literature constitutes common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances. The court also affirmed mechanisms for shifting evidentiary burdens when information asymmetry exists between parties. Concurrently, EUIPO published detailed implementation guidelines for Phase Two of its design reform program, scheduled to enter into force on July 1, 2026. In the United Kingdom, the UKIPO launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support research institutions in commercializing intellectual property. Market consolidation continued as DeepIP acquired the German AI patent tool PatentMaker, signaling intensified competition in legal tech. These shifts collectively enhance litigation predictability at the UPC while requiring immediate strategic adjustments for design portfolio management ahead of new EU regulations.
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC Milan established specific exceptions for patent literature as common general knowledge and formalized burden-shifting mechanisms.
EUIPO transitioned from legislative updates to issuing practical implementation guidelines for the upcoming design reform.
Cross-border M&A activity increased in the legal tech sector with DeepIP’s entry into the German market.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor UPC Court of Appeal decisions for further clarification on inventive step assessment methodologies.
Track technical feedback and system tests prior to the EUIPO new design registry launch.
Observe appellate proceedings regarding trademark distinctiveness rulings in French courts.
key_moves_en: UPC Milan strengthens evidentiary advantages for rights holders in infringement proceedings.
EUIPO publishes final operational guidelines for the July 2026 design reform.
UKIPO launches a centralized platform for knowledge asset management and commercialization.
DeepIP expands its European footprint through the acquisition of PatentMaker.
business_actions_en: Leverage information asymmetry arguments to shift evidentiary burdens in UPC infringement litigation.
Audit existing design portfolios against new EUIPO guidelines to ensure compliance by July 2026.
Evaluate Cyprus IP Box regime benefits for optimizing tax structures on software and innovation assets.
watchlist_en: Harmonization of inventive step assessment standards across UPC divisions.
Regulatory and geopolitical developments concerning NGT-1 plant patents in Europe.
Admissibility standards for economic evidence in life sciences damages calculations.
quick_takeaways_en: Patent literature is rarely considered common general knowledge at the UPC without coherent series evidence.
EUIPO design reform implementation details are now available for pre-July 2026 strategic planning.
UK research institutions should utilize the new KAM Hub for improved IP governance frameworks.
regional_shift_en: Increased integration of AI tools in German patent practice
Strengthened public IP support infrastructure in the United Kingdom
strategic_implications_en: Litigation strategies at the UPC must adapt to stricter evidentiary standards for common general knowledge.
Companies must align design filing practices with new EUIPO procedural requirements before the July deadline.
Research-intensive organizations should integrate UKIPO guidance into internal IP commercialization workflows.

report_items.title_zh: 指南：知识资产管理枢纽
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）宣布推出“知识资产管理枢纽”。该新资源旨在加强英国研究领域的知识产权能力，并支持相关成果的商业化转化。原文仅提供标题与摘要，未披露具体功能细节。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has launched the Knowledge Asset Management Hub, a new resource designed to strengthen intellectual property capability and support commercialisation across the UK research sector. This initiative aims to assist research institutions in managing knowledge assets more effectively. The announcement confirms the availability of this platform but does not provide detailed operational specifics or functional modules in the initial release. Rights holders and research entities operating within the United Kingdom should note this development as part of the broader...
core_points_zh: 英国知识产权局正式推出名为“知识资产管理枢纽”的新资源平台
该资源目标为强化英国研究部门的知识产权能力及支持商业化
core_points_en: UKIPO introduces the Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support the UK research sector.
The resource aims to strengthen IP capability and facilitate commercialisation of research outputs.
report_items.insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息极简，仅能确认UKIPO启动了面向研究部门的支持项目。需持续观察该枢纽的具体服务内容、适用对象资格及是否提供实质性IP评估或交易辅助工具，以评估其对研发机构的实际效用。
report_items.insight_en: This launch signals continued UK government focus on bridging the gap between academic research and commercial application through improved IP management tools. For in-house counsel and technology transfer offices, this hub may offer standardized frameworks or guidance. However, given the limited initial information, its practical utility remains to be seen. Stakeholders should assess whether the hub provides actiona...
insight_points_zh: 确认UKIPO针对研究领域推出了新的IP支持基础设施
需等待后续官方指南以明确该枢纽的具体功能模块与服务范围
关注该资源是否包含具体的IP商业化最佳实践或案例库

Practice note: In-house teams should review the hub for any new standard operating procedures or templates that could streamline knowledge asset audits and valuation processes.
What to monitor: Track subsequent updates to determine specific features, eligibility criteria, and whether the hub integrates with existing UK innovation support schemes or datab…

report_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）今日发布了关于其欧盟外观设计改革计划第二阶段实施的更多细节。该改革阶段预计将于2026年7月1日生效。此次发布为注册外观设计申请人及从业者在即将到来的变革前提供了亟需的指导。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published additional details regarding the implementation of Phase 2 of its design reform programme. These changes are scheduled to enter into force on 1 July 2026. The newly released guidance aims to provide clarity for registered design applicants and legal practitioners ahead of the imminent regulatory updates. This announcement serves as a preparatory resource for stakeholders managing EU design portfolios, offering early insight into procedural adjustments. By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...
core_points_zh: EUIPO发布了欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施的进一步细节与指南
该改革计划的第二阶段定于2026年7月1日正式生效
新指南旨在为注册外观设计申请人及从业者提供前期指导
core_points_en: EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme.
The revised design regulations and associated procedures are scheduled to take effect on 1 July 2026.
New guidance provides preparatory clarity for registered design applicants and practitioners before changes occur.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。

For in-house counsel and external practitioners, reviewing this guidance is essential to align internal processes with upcoming requirements. While specific procedural mechanics may evolve, current materials allow for preliminary assessment of portfolio management impacts. Stakeholders should integrate these timelines i...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders gain early notice of regulatory changes affecting EU design registration and maintenance from July 2026.
Practice note: Practitioners should review the guidance to identify procedural adjustments needed for future filings and portfolio administration.
What to monitor: Track subsequent EUIPO communications for detailed operational instructions and transitional measures leading up to the effective date.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

report_items.title_zh: 超越资格认证：新任商标律师的执业导航
report_items.title_en: CITMA Guidance on Transitioning from Qualification to Practice for New Trade Mark Attorneys
report_items.title: Beyond qualification: navigating life as a newly qualified Trade Mark Attorney
report_items.summary_zh: 英国特许商标律师协会（CITMA）发布文章及网络研讨会回顾，旨在指导新获得资格的商标律师适应职业生涯初期挑战。内容涵盖从理论学习到商业实践的转变，强调建立客户信任、提供具有商业背景的法律建议以及保持职业健康的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: The Chartered Institute of Trade Mark Attorneys (CITMA) publishes guidance addressing the professional transition for newly qualified trade mark attorneys. Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. It emphasizes that early-career professionals must move beyond identifying legal risks to providing context-aware business recommendations. Key themes include understanding client economic pressures, avoiding indecisive advice, and building trust through consistency and clarity. The guidance a...
core_points_zh: 新任律师需从单纯识别法律风险转向结合宏观微观经济压力提供商业决策支持
避免仅呈现选项而不给建议，应评估法律与商业局势以成为值得信赖的顾问
良好的客户关系建立在一致性、清晰度和诚实基础上，同时需注重个人福祉
core_points_en: New attorneys must shift from pure legal risk identification to providing commercially contextualized business decision support.
Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文属于职业发展指导，强调商标律师在早期执业中需平衡法律严谨性与商业实用性。对于初级从业者而言，理解客户商业语境并提供明确导向性建议是提升专业地位的关键，而非仅停留在法律条文分析层面。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance underscores the expectation for trade mark attorneys to function as trusted commercial advisors rather than solely legal technicians. For firms and in-house teams, it highlights the importance of mentoring junior staff to deliver decisive, business-oriented counsel. report_items.title_zh: Mondaq：UPC 专利调解与仲裁中心正式开放，或为 FRAND 和欧洲专利争议提供 ADR 路径
report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...
core_points_zh: 塞浦路斯知识产权盒提供80%利润扣除，结合15%企业税率，使合格IP收入有效税率降至约…
制度核心为修正关联法，确保税收减免比例与企业实际发生的合格研发支出相匹配，符合经合组织…
受版权保护的软件、算法及平台属于合格知识产权，但商标和徽标等品牌相关资产不符合该制度资格
core_points_en: Qualifying IP income benefits from an eighty percent deduction, yielding an effective tax rate near three percent.
The modified nexus approach links tax relief directly to substantiated research and development expenditures incurred by the entity.
Copyrighted software and digital assets qualify for the regime, whereas brand-related assets such as trademarks are excluded.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This regime is relevant for technology companies structuring IP ownership within the EU. It emphasizes substance over form, requiring robust documentation of R&D spend to justify tax benefits. Rights holders should assess whether their software development activities meet the modified nexus criteria to optimize fiscal efficiency while maintaining OECD compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Tech firms holding copyrighted software can significantly reduce tax liability on IP-derived income through structured R&D investment.
Practice note: Accurate allocation and documentation of qualifying R&D expenditures are essential to satisfy the modified nexus approach requirements.
What to monitor: Watch for evolving administrative guidance on eligible R&D costs and potential updates to OECD nexus standards affecting eligibility.

weekly_report.executive_line_en: The UPC establishes a dual-track dispute resolution system with PMAC, while the UK accelerates independent IP infrastructure development, widening the regulatory gap with the European Union.
weekly_report.summary_en: This week, the European intellectual property landscape is defined by institutional maturation and increasing jurisdictional divergence. The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally commenced operations, integrating alternative dispute resolution into the Unified Patent Court framework. Concurrently, the UPC Milan Local Division issued significant rulings on evidentiary burdens and common general knowledge in patent infringement cases. In parallel, the United Kingdom is strengthening its post-Brexit IP ecosystem through the launch of the UKIPO Knowledge Asset Management Hub and updated software patent examination guidelines. These developments contrast with the European Union’s targeted copyright reforms, which now focus on artificial intelligence and sports piracy via new Commission consultations. Additionally, the EUIPO released final guidance for upcoming design regulation changes. Rights holders must now navigate a bifurcated environment: adapting to the UPC’s expanding procedural toolkit in Europe while managing distinct commercialization and patentability standards in the UK. Strategic alignment with these diverging paths is essential for effective portfolio ma...

daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Milan Clarifies Evidence Rules as EUIPO Design Reform Nears
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于UPC司法实践深化与机构服务升级。UPC米兰分院在两起轮胎案中作出侵权认定，并明确专利文献作为公知常识的严格标准及信息不对称下的举证责任转移，显著提升诉讼可预测性。EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，为7月生效新规铺路。UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽，强化研究部门IP商业化支持。DeepIP收购德国PatentMaker，AI专利工具市场竞争加剧。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: This week’s European IP developments highlight significant procedural clarifications at the Unified Patent Court and regulatory updates from EUIPO. The UPC Milan Local Division issued key rulings in patent infringement cases involving tire manufacturers, establishing that patent literature constitutes common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances. The court also affirmed mechanisms for shifting evidentiary burdens when information asymmetry exists between parties. Concurrently, EUIPO published detailed implementation guidelines for Phase Two of its design reform program, scheduled to enter into force on July 1, 2026. In the United Kingdom, the UKIPO launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support research institutions in commercializing intellectual property. Market consolidation continued as DeepIP acquired the German AI patent tool PatentMaker, signaling intensified competition in legal tech. These shifts collectively enhance litigation predictability at the UPC while requiring immediate strategic adjustments for design portfolio management ahead of new EU regulations.

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年6月10日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集。关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架。

总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、外观设计、专利展开，接下来值得继续关注UPC创造性评估标准的统一化进程。
transcript_lines_en: Today is June 10, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets. Why it matters: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property an.

Next, UKIPO introduces the Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support the UK research sector. Why it matters: Research-intensive organizations and universities in the UK should evaluate if this hub offers relevant tools for their internal IP gov.

Next, Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive. Why it matters: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.

Finally, EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme. Why it matters: Rights holders gain early notice of regulatory changes affecting EU design registration and maintenance from July 2026.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on General IP, Trade marks, Designs. The next point to watch is Harmonization of inventive step assessment standards across UPC divisions.

topics.headline_en: UPC Maturity, PMAC Launch, and Rising Chinese Patent Activity
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋于成熟，PMAC调解中心正式启用，杜塞尔多夫等关键分院扩容。与此同时，中国首次跻身欧洲专利申请来源国前三，统一专利采纳率显著提升。UPC判例在证据披露、权利要求解释及费用裁定上确立严格标准，中欧企业需适应其高效诉讼与ADR并行的新生态，优化在欧IP战略布局。
key_points: 制度完善：PMAC调解仲裁中心上线，杜塞尔多夫增设合议庭，案件管理系统升级，诉讼与ADR并行机制形成。
中国崛起：2025年中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利请求量增长强劲，中小企业参与度提高。
司法严规：UPC判例明确审查档案限制保护范围、严格执行证据前置披露、细化费用分担及等同侵权判定标准。
actions: 利用PMAC机制处理SEP/FRAND纠纷，降低维权成本，熟悉CCMS系统以高效启动ADR程序。
保持授权阶段陈述与诉讼策略一致，避免审查档案中的限制性陈述被用于狭义解释权利要求。
针对德法荷等案件集中地制定差异化应诉策略，严守证据披露时限，避免因程序瑕疵导致败诉。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院就管辖权范围向欧盟法院提请裁决的后续结果及其对统一专利效力的影响。
2027年EPO指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明义务的具体落地及对异议程序的潜在冲击。
主要分院（如米兰、赫尔辛基）在等同原则及公知常识认定上的判例趋势，预判法律确定性走向。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) reached operational maturity with the formal launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) and expanded judicial capacity in key divisions like Düsseldorf. Concurrently, China entered the top three countries of origin for European patent applications in 2025, driving increased Unitary Patent adoption. UPC jurisprudence has established strict standards regarding evidence disclosure, claim interpretation via prosecution history, and cost allocation. These developments create a dual landscape of efficient litigation and structured alternative dispute resolution. Stakeholders must adapt to this evolving ecosystem by aligning prosecution strategies with litigation risks and leveraging new ADR mechanisms to optimize intellectual property protection and enforcement across Europe.
key_points_en: Institutional maturity: The PMAC procedural rules are adopted and its Case Management System is live, while Düsseldorf adds a second panel, solidifying a parallel litigation and AD...
Market shifts: China ranked among the top three EPO filing sources in 2025, with strong Unitary Patent uptake and increased participation from small and medium-sized enterprises.
Judicial standards: UPC case law enforces strict pre-trial evidence disclosure, limits claim scope based on prosecution history, and refines criteria for cost allocation and equiva...
actions_en: Leverage the new PMAC mechanisms for SEP and FRAND disputes to reduce costs, and familiarize teams with the CCMS platform for efficient ADR initiation.
Ensure consistency between prosecution statements and litigation positions to prevent restrictive arguments in the file history from narrowing claim interpretation in court.
Develop differentiated defense strategies for key jurisdictions like Germany, France, and the Netherlands, strictly adhering to evidence disclosure deadlines to avoid procedural de...
watchlist_en: Outcomes of UPC Court of Appeal referrals to the CJEU regarding jurisdiction and their impact on the validity and effect of Unitary Patents.
Implementation details of the 2027 EPO Guidelines, particularly mandatory indication of amendment bases, and their potential effect on opposition and validity proceedings.
Emerging case law trends from major local divisions on equivalents and common general knowledge to assess future legal certainty and enforcement risks.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP司法博弈加剧与ADR新路径
topics.headline_en: European SEP Litigation Intensifies as ADR Mechanisms Emerge
topics.summary_zh: 2026年欧洲SEP领域呈现UPC诉讼激增与替代性争议解决机制（ADR）兴起并行的态势。中英法院在ZTE诉三星案中作出冲突的全球费率判决，凸显管辖权竞争。UPC曼海姆分院打破传统尝试裁定FRAND费率，且禁诉令对抗激烈。PMAC正式运营为许可争议提供新出口，企业需应对司法碎片化风险。
key_points: UPC积极介入FRAND费率裁定并签发反反诉禁令，中英法院出现全球费率判决冲突，司法管辖权争夺白热化。
UPC专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）正式开放，确立诉讼与ADR并行机制，为复杂许可争议提供高效解决路径。
修订版TTBER生效及英国SEP改革推进，强化对专利池及集体谈判的反垄断合规要求，许可透明度监管趋严。
actions: 收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留FRAND抗辩权，避免被认定非善意实施者而面临禁令。
审查现有许可协议，明确退出UPC管辖的决策权归属，并评估在新TTBER框架下的反垄断合规风险。
建立中欧双轨应诉策略，针对UPC禁诉令提前预案，同时积极探索利用PMAC进行调解以降低诉讼成本。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于专利池FRAND义务及全球费率管辖权的最终裁决动向。
UPC上诉法院对长臂管辖权界限及跨境禁令效力的进一步澄清案例。
欧盟层面是否出台统一SEP许可框架以缓解当前司法碎片化与判决冲突问题。

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.

insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with United Kingdom close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 26 条，占近期样本 28%。重点企业包括 ZTE / Huawei / Oppo。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 26 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 28% of the sample. Focus companies include ZTE / Huawei / Oppo.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 98% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。

insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European standard-essential patent landscape in 2026 is defined by a surge in Unified Patent Court litigation alongside the rise of alternative dispute resolution. Conflicting global FRAND rate judgments between Chinese and UK courts highlight intensifying jurisdictional competition. The UPC Mannheim Local Division has issued anti-anti-suit injunctions, while the newly operational Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre offers a structured alternative for complex licensing disputes. Concurrently, the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation and ongoing UK SEP reforms are tightening antitrust compliance and transparency requirements for patent pools. Rights holders and implementers must navigate this fragmented judicial environment by balancing aggressive enforcement strategies with efficient mediation options to mitigate regulatory and litigation risks.
key_points_en: UPC courts are actively asserting jurisdiction over FRAND rates and issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions, escalating conflicts with Asian and UK judicial decisions.
The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre is now operational, providing a confidential, efficient alternative to litigation for resolving complex SEP licensing disputes.
Enhanced antitrust scrutiny under the revised TTBER and UK regulatory reforms demands stricter compliance regarding patent pool operations and licensing transparency.
actions_en: Respond promptly to infringement notices with clear written expressions of licensing willingness to preserve FRAND defenses and avoid injunctions.
Review existing license agreements to clarify decision-making authority for UPC opt-outs and assess antitrust compliance under the new TTBER framework.
Develop dual-track strategies for Europe and China, preparing for UPC procedural nuances while leveraging mediation mechanisms to reduce litigation costs.
watchlist_en: Final rulings from the UK Supreme Court on global FRAND rate jurisdiction and patent pool obligations.
UPC Court of Appeal precedents clarifying the limits of cross-border injunctions and international jurisdiction.
Potential EU-level legislative initiatives aimed at harmonizing SEP licensing frameworks to address judicial fragmentation.

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟IP执法趋严与设计改革
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Strengthens Enforcement, Design Reform, and SME IP Finance Support
topics.summary_zh: EUIPO联合欧委会及Eurojust强化打击网络假冒与有组织犯罪，执法数字化升级。外观设计改革第二阶段指南发布，7月生效。法院明确脱欧后英国未注册商标失效，名人商标注册受限。中小企业可获基金补贴及IP融资支持，需关注手工艺品地理标志过渡期。
key_points: 执法协同：EUIPO联手欧委会、Eurojust打击网络假冒，推广IPEP数字执法工具，SHIELD行动查获巨额假药。
制度变革：欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段指南发布（7月生效）；DesignView成全球最大外观搜索库。
司法确权：法院裁定脱欧后纯英国未注册商标不得异议欧盟商标；名人姓名注册因描述性被拒。
actions: 利用SME基金补贴降低欧盟商标/外观申请成本，提前布局高价值品牌。
针对7月生效的外观设计新规调整申请策略，利用DesignView进行全球查重。
建立供应链合规溯源体系，应对欧盟跨机构高压执法，避免涉假刑事风险。
watchlist: 2026年12月手工艺品/工业品地理标志国家向欧盟制度过渡截止情况。
欧盟层面关于知名商标声誉评估及名人姓名注册的最新判例口径。
EUIPO与EIF合作的知识产权质押融资机制落地细节及中企适用性。
topics.summary_en: The EUIPO has intensified collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust to combat online counterfeiting and organized crime, highlighted by Operation SHIELD VI seizures. Concurrently, the second phase of EU design reform guidelines is set for July implementation, while DesignView expands as the global standard for prior art searches. Judicial developments clarify that post-Brexit UK unregistered rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions, and courts continue to scrutinize reputation evidence in invalidity proceedings. For businesses, new avenues for IP-backed financing via the European Investment Fund and targeted SME subsidies offer strategic opportunities. Rights holders must also prepare for the December 2026 transition deadline for craft and industrial geographical indications, ensuring compliance with the new centralized EU framework.
key_points_en: Enforcement digitization: EUIPO deploys IPEP tools and supports cross-border operations like SHIELD VI to disrupt counterfeit networks and protect brand integrity.
Design ecosystem updates: DesignView becomes the world’s largest image search engine, and new reform guidelines take effect in July, requiring adjusted filing strategies.
Legal certainty shifts: Courts rule UK-only unregistered rights ineffective for EU oppositions post-transition, while emphasizing comprehensive evidence for trademark reputation cl...
actions_en: Leverage EUIPO-EIF partnerships and SME funds to secure IP-backed financing and reduce registration costs for high-value assets.
Utilize enhanced DesignView capabilities for global clearance searches and align applications with the July design reform guidelines.
Audit supply chains and procurement protocols to mitigate criminal liability risks amid heightened multi-agency enforcement actions.
watchlist_en: December 2026 deadline for transitioning national craft and industrial geographical indications to the new EU-wide protection system.
Evolving judicial standards for assessing trademark reputation and the registrability of celebrity names in light of recent General Court rulings.
Operational details of the EUIPO-EIF IP finance initiative and its eligibility criteria for innovative enterprises seeking capital.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against IP Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级打击假冒执法力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会及Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦网络侵权与有组织犯罪；英国UKIPO获资金延长至2029年并拟扩编，重点监管二手平台。中欧品牌面临更严密的刑事执法网络与全渠道监控，需从被动维权转向主动合规与供应链溯源管理。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联合欧盟委员会、Eurojust推进EMPACT框架，强化针对网络假冒及药品等领域的跨境刑事司法协作。
英国动态：UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编，发布二手时尚反假指南，将Resale平台纳入执法重点。
执法趋势：执法重心从单一民事维权转向打击有组织犯罪网络，强调在线侵权监测、消费者教育及供应链源头治理。
actions: 建立全渠道监测机制：除传统电商外，将Vinted等二手交易平台及社交媒体纳入日常侵权监控范围。
强化供应链合规溯源：完善出口产品防伪标识与溯源体系，配合欧洲海关与警方调查，规避连带法律责任。
深化政企执法协作：主动向EUIPO及当地执法机构提供侵权线索与专业知识，利用EMPACT等多边机制提升维权效率。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒与盗版联合行动的具体配套法规或执行口径。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编后的具体职能变化及2029年前的案件查处数据趋势。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的年度优先事项调整及跨机构协作新动态。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated enforcement actions against intellectual property crime. The EUIPO, in collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust, deepened inter-agency cooperation under the EMPACT framework, targeting online infringement and organized criminal networks. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office secured funding extensions for its IP Crime Unit until 2029, with plans for expansion and a new focus on regulating secondary resale platforms. Brands operating in these jurisdictions face a more rigorous criminal enforcement landscape and comprehensive multi-channel monitoring. The UK IPO has extended funding for its IP Crime Unit until 2029 and is expanding oversight of second-hand marketplaces, issuing new guidance for resale platforms.

Operational changes and case prosecution trends following the expansion of the UK IP Crime Unit through 2029.
Annual priority adjustments and new inter-agency collaboration dynamics within the EMPACT framework for intellectual property crime enforcement.
